creator: brett@peloton.runet.edu
text:
I moved across the country and need to update my maintainer addresses
	and a few distfile sites in 10 ports or so that I maintain.

How-To-Repeat: 
	just try to mail me at my old address - I dare you!  To fix apply 
	patch included below (it's a big ol' patch - if this wasn't the 
	way to do this let me know - I did it from /usr/ports so I could 
	do them all at once)
